task_comp_comp_001_p1.description:
PHASE 1: Implement Config (todo_app/config.py)
Defines application-wide constants and configuration values. This module acts as the single source of truth for UI colors, window dimensions, and file paths for persistence, ensuring consistency across the entire GUI and data layer.

REQUIRED PUBLIC INTERFACE:
Constants: APP_TITLE: str = 'Quantum Todo', WINDOW_SIZE: str = '400x500', STORAGE_FILE: str = 'tasks.json', PRIMARY_COLOR: str = '#4A90E2', BG_COLOR: str = '#F5F7FA'

task_comp_comp_002_p1.description:
PHASE 1: Implement TaskModel (todo_app/models.py)
Defines the core Task data structure using dataclasses for type safety. It encapsulates the properties of a single todo item, including its content, completion status, and unique identifier for state management.

REQUIRED PUBLIC INTERFACE:
Classes: Task
Functions:
  Task.__init__(self, id: str, title: str, completed: bool = False) -> None
  Task.to_dict(self) -> dict[str, any]
  Task.from_dict(cls, data: dict[str, any]) -> 'Task'

task_comp_comp_009_p1.description:
PHASE 1: Implement Utils (todo_app/utils.py)
Provides shared helper functions such as ID generation or simple string manipulation. These utilities keep the domain logic and UI code clean by centralizing common repetitive tasks.

REQUIRED PUBLIC INTERFACE:
Functions:
  generate_unique_id() -> str

task_comp_comp_011_p1.description:
PHASE 1: Implement Requirements (requirements.txt)
Lists all necessary dependencies for the environment, specifically ensuring that standard library support is met and any external tooling for packaging is declared for the CI/CD pipeline.

REQUIRED PUBLIC INTERFACE:
none specified

task_comp_comp_013_p1.description:
PHASE 1: Implement EventBus (todo_app/events.py)
A centralized pub/sub mechanism that decouples UI components from the business logic layer. It allows signals such as 'task-added', 'task-toggled', and 'task-deleted' to be broadcasted and handled without direct coupling.

REQUIRED PUBLIC INTERFACE:
Classes: EventBus
Functions:
  EventBus.subscribe(self, event_type: str, callback: callable) -> None
  EventBus.publish(self, event_type: str, data: any) -> None

task_comp_comp_005_p1.description:
PHASE 1: Implement TaskEntryField (todo_app/ui/components.py)
A reusable UI component for user text input. It wraps the tkinter Entry widget to provide a clean interface for typing new task descriptions with integrated validation logic and event handling.

REQUIRED PUBLIC INTERFACE:
Classes: TaskEntry
Functions:
  TaskEntry.__init__(self, master: any, **kwargs) -> None
  TaskEntry.get_text(self) -> str
  TaskEntry.clear(self) -> None

task_comp_comp_003_p1.description:
PHASE 1: Implement StorageService (todo_app/storage.py)
Handles persistent storage of tasks to a JSON file. This service acts as the data access layer, responsible for loading and saving the list of Task objects to ensure data durability across application sessions.

REQUIRED PUBLIC INTERFACE:
Classes: StorageManager
Functions:
  StorageManager.__init__(self, file_path: str) -> None
  StorageManager.load_tasks(self) -> list[Task]
  StorageManager.save_tasks(self, tasks: list[Task]) -> None

task_comp_comp_012_p1.description:
PHASE 1: Implement DockerConfig (Dockerfile)
Defines the container environment for the application. It captures the operating system dependencies and Python runtime, ensuring that GUI applications can execute via X11 forwarding by configuring DISPLAY environment variables and base image requirements.

REQUIRED PUBLIC INTERFACE:
none specified

task_comp_comp_006_p1.description:
PHASE 1: Implement TaskItemWidget (todo_app/ui/components.py)
A custom GUI component representing a single row in the task list. It displays the task text, a checkbox for completion, and a delete button, publishing events to the bus when interactions occur.

REQUIRED PUBLIC INTERFACE:
Classes: TaskRow
Functions:
  TaskRow.__init__(self, master: any, task: Task, bus: EventBus) -> None

task_comp_comp_004_p1.description:
PHASE 1: Implement TodoManager (todo_app/manager.py)
Acts as the controller that orchestrates business logic and manages the application state. It maintains the master list of tasks and provides an interface for adding, updating, and removing tasks while coordinating with the storage service and event bus.

REQUIRED PUBLIC INTERFACE:
Classes: TodoManager
Functions:
  TodoManager.__init__(self, storage: StorageManager, bus: EventBus) -> None
  TodoManager.get_all_tasks(self) -> list[Task]
  TodoManager.add_task(self, title: str) -> Task
  TodoManager.toggle_task(self, task_id: str) -> None
  TodoManager.delete_task(self, task_id: str) -> None

task_comp_comp_007_p1.description:
PHASE 1: Implement TaskListView (todo_app/ui/components.py)
A scrollable container that renders the list of active tasks. It manages the layout of multiple TaskItemWidget instances and provides a method to refresh the UI content based on task list state.

REQUIRED PUBLIC INTERFACE:
Classes: TaskListView
Functions:
  TaskListView.__init__(self, master: any, **kwargs) -> None
  TaskListView.clear(self) -> None
  TaskListView.add_row(self, row: TaskRow) -> None
  TaskListView.render_tasks(self, tasks: list[Task]) -> None

task_comp_comp_008_p1.description:
PHASE 1: Implement MainApplication (todo_app/ui/main_window.py)
The primary window class that binds the UI components to the manager. It handles window layout, listens to the event bus for state updates, and triggers refreshing the view.

REQUIRED PUBLIC INTERFACE:
Classes: TodoApp
Functions:
  TodoApp.__init__(self, manager: TodoManager, bus: EventBus) -> None
  TodoApp.run(self) -> None
  TodoApp.refresh_list(self) -> None

task_comp_comp_010_p1.description:
PHASE 1: Implement AppEntry (main.py)
The system-managed entry point that initializes the dependency injection container, sets up the event bus, storage connection, launches the manager, and displays the main application window.

REQUIRED PUBLIC INTERFACE:
Functions:
  main() -> None

task_integration_test.description: Final integration: final build check and smoke tests
